decision: Epic Fury 2026 is selected as the current champion product.
ratified_by: Michael Bryan Hoch, Founder, Hoch Agent Swarm
selection_basis: closest known product to production distribution
currently positioned at the App Store gate
shortest credible path to shipped revenue
substantial existing implementation and release evidence
suitable for measuring founder intervention and shipped-dollar outcomes
constraints: no production submission without explicit founder action
no signing, credential provisioning, payment movement, or App Store submission by agents
all non-founder work must be completed autonomously
all release assertions must be evidence-bound
blockers, missing evidence, and stale state must render explicitly
prior neutral TO-003 proof does not count as a product shipment
terminal_outcome_required: Epic Fury 2026 reaches a complete DOORSTEP release package containing all non-founder work necessary for TestFlight/App Store submission, with founder-only actions isolated and minimized.
permanence: ROTATES — a current portfolio designation, not a permanent North Star.
